examples: So the hippodrome is the circus in Latin.
The carriage-way round the circular railing presented such a magnificent hippodrome.
Then suddenly they vanished behind a great clump of trees growing in the middle of the Hippodrome.
Four years later, in July 1913 a new company, The Wrexham Hippodrome Ltd, was registered.
Then, on 9 September 1929 the Hippodrome showed the first sound film in Wrexham.
